Grandma's Apple Pie

This is my grandmother's classic apple pie recipe, passed down through generations. The secret is in the cinnamon.

Ingredients

  • 6 cups apples, peeled and sliced
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 2 tablespoons cinnamon
  • 1 tablespoon butter
  • 2 pie crusts

Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 425F.
  2. Line pie dish with one crust.
  3. Mix apples, sugar, cinnamon. Pour into crust.
  4. Dot with butter. Cover with top crust.
  5. Bake 40-50 minutes until golden.
